recommendations.title: Under the Amalfi Sun
recommendations.overview: A year after their romance began in Riccione, Vincenzo and Camilla reunite for a vacation on the picturesque Amalfi Coast and put their love to the test.

recommendations.title: The Witches of Eastwick
recommendations.overview: Three single women in a picturesque village have their wishes granted, at a cost, when a mysterious and flamboyant man arrives in their lives.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Sheep & Wolves
recommendations.overview: In a magical faraway land, in a picturesque little village nestled among green meadows and rolling hills, lives a flock of carefree sheep. But their pastoral and stress-free life is interrupted when a pack of wolves sets up camp in the nearby ravine.

recommendations.title: See You Yesterday
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Drama, Adventure, Crime, Action
recommendations.overview: As two teen prodigies try to master the art of time travel, a tragic police shooting sends them on a series of dangerous trips to the past.

recommendations.title: The Abyss
recommendations.overview: As the Swedish town of Kiruna sinks, Frigga finds herself torn between her family and her job as security chief at the world's largest underground mine.

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Atacama's 33
recommendations.overview: A team of Chilean miners are trapped underground for months and hold out for a miraculous rescue.

recommendations.title: The Kill Room
recommendations.overview: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

recommendations.title: The Big Fake
recommendations.overview: Toni Chichiarelli arrives in Rome with the dream of becoming a painter, but his talent leads him elsewhere — from art galleries to state secrets. Between art, crime, and power, his signature ends up everywhere — even in the history of Italy.
